alt_text: Hierarchy diagram. Top box (dark gray) contains الروح (Al-Ruh / the Spirit). Two arrows descend to two child boxes: bottom-left box contains نفس (Nafs / the Self) rendered in blue text, and bottom-right box contains عقل (Aql / the Intellect) rendered in red text. The diagram visualizes the doctrine that the Spirit (al-Ruh) bifurcates into its two manifest faculties: Intellect and Self.
notes: No Quran or hadith content. Pure conceptual schematic. The color coding (red for Aql, blue for Nafs) appears to be consistent across the chapter's diagrams.
